calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Jul-01-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for OSC hearing for Change of Name of an Adult and Change of Name of a Minor.
Dept. 218, Judge Ollie Marie-Victoire, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Linda S. Forster, #13286.

Clifford Y. Wang appeared with petitioners Chia He Tom & Oi Kam Suen Tom, who was placed under oath and examined.
Clifford Y. Wang was placed under oath and served as Cantonese speaking interpreter for petitioners.
Proof of Publication in file.

No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct and sufficient, and that the petition should be granted.

The Court grants the petition for Change of Name to: Chia He Tam.

The Court grants the petition for Change of Name of a Minor to: Alfred Tam.

Decree Changing Name was submitted to and signed by the Court.
